root_text.sn37.2:1.1: “Pañcahi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgato puriso ekantaamanāpo hoti mātugāmassa.
root_text.sn37.2:1.3: Na ca rūpavā hoti, na ca bhogavā hoti, na ca sīlavā hoti, alaso ca hoti, pajañcassa na labhati—
root_text.sn37.2:1.4: imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahi aṅgehi samannāgato puriso ekantaamanāpo hoti mātugāmassa.
root_text.sn37.2:1.5: Pañcahi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgato puriso ekantamanāpo hoti mātugāmassa.
root_text.sn37.2:1.7: Rūpavā ca hoti, bhogavā ca hoti, sīlavā ca hoti, dakkho ca hoti analaso, pajañcassa labhati—
root_text.sn37.2:1.8: imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahi aṅgehi samannāgato puriso ekantamanāpo hoti mātugāmassā”ti.

translation_text.sn37.2:1.1: “Mendicants, when a man has five factors he is extremely undesirable to a lady.
translation_text.sn37.2:1.3: He’s not attractive, wealthy, or ethical; he’s idle, and he doesn’t beget children.
translation_text.sn37.2:1.4: When a man has these five factors he is extremely undesirable to a lady.
translation_text.sn37.2:1.5: When a man has five factors he is extremely desirable to a lady.
translation_text.sn37.2:1.7: He’s attractive, wealthy, and ethical; he’s deft and tireless, and he begets children.
translation_text.sn37.2:1.8: When a man has these five factors he is extremely desirable to a lady.”
